ksa_text: Establish and maintain the enterprise data catalog, including asset classification, metadata management, data lineage documentation, and discoverability infrastructure.

dcwf.top_element_label: Collect intrusion artifacts (e.g., source code, malware, trojans) and use discovered data to enable mitigation of potential cyber defense incidents within the enterprise.

nice.top_element_label: Knowledge of data de-identification tools and techniques
